architectReview.evidence: Architect review stage-14 found 2 BLOCKERS (partial-batch gate bypass; hook fail-open on import error). Both fixed: runstate pre-registers every URL as pending and cli.run records failures while continuing the batch; the hook reads run-state itself (no import coupling) and treats failed/pending/missing/unreadable as exit-2 (fail closed), only an absent run-state file no-ops. stage-15 re-review: CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR + APPROVE, 0 blockers, both BLOCKERS RESOLVED. Two non-blocking LOW follow-ups noted (clear run-state after a passing turn; cosmetic label — label fixed).
